questions.question: What country uses the common greeting: "Have you eaten rice yet"?
What movie was almost titled Along Came a Spider?
Whose famous birth year may have been miscalculated by a 6th-century monk, and might really be between 5 and 8 B.C.?
What did a U.S. librarian named Melvil give the world in 1876?
What two hoops teams with the same nickname played the 1997 NCAA Division 1 Championship game?
questions.answer: The Arizona Wildcats and Kentucky Wildcats

questions.question: What Plymouth and Dodge models were the first U.S. cars to be called "minivans"?
